MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-12-2007 IN 206, DEFENDANT MICHAEL GALLIN'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 3/17/08 IS CONTINUED TO 5/12/08 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT.
